title: nephrodium ochthodes
intro: Nephrodium ochthodes, also known as the Ochre Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium ochthodes include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
